item.description: Pinnacle @Pinnacle · 9min Four more Stanley Cup Playoffs games today: No se pudo reproducir el contenido multimedia. Recargar 162

item.title: robpizzola: Rob Pizzola @robpizzola · 9min I have two bettors I really respect telling me completely different things about the #2 p
item.description: Rob Pizzola @robpizzola · 9min I have two bettors I really respect telling me completely different things about the #2 pick. One is loading up on David Bailey to the Jets. The other is loading up on Arvell Reese to the Jets. Someone is going to have a very bad night on Thursday. 9 4 912

Rich Cimini @RichCimini · 54min The annual Leggy 100 (via @Jeff_Legwold ). A must-read for dreftniks. His No. 1 prospect: Arvell Reese, a “rare player with elite versatility.” #nfldraft De espn.com 3 14 9 mil

item.title: RichCimini: Rich Cimini @RichCimini · 1h If there’s anyone who knows what it’s like to be sitting on a gold mine of draft picks, it’
item.description: Rich Cimini @RichCimini · 1h If there’s anyone who knows what it’s like to be sitting on a gold mine of draft picks, it’s Jimmy Johnson. So I called the #Cowboys legend to discuss the #Jets situation. Some fascinating insights. De espn.com 4 7 23 14 mil

item.title: Clevta: Clevta @Clevta · 1h Haven’t taken much irt draft bets. Have some Tyson to Browns at 6 from Friday. Just took some Siddiq
item.description: Clevta @Clevta · 1h Haven’t taken much irt draft bets. Have some Tyson to Browns at 6 from Friday. Just took some Siddiq to #8 (NO) on Kalshi and 20-1 on FD. There’s 25-1 on DK if u have access. Checks lot of the boxes that Loomis likes in the draft and they never take who most expect. All we know Mostrar más 5 19 6 mil
